headers.name: X-Radzen-Key
headers.description: Radzen Blazor MCP key — free trial (50 requests / 15 days) at https://www.radzen.com/blazor-mcp, or a Radzen Blazor Pro / Team license key for unlimited access.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Use this tool for Radzen-related questions, especially Radzen Blazor components (DataGrid, Form, Dialog, Chart, Scheduler), themes, data binding, setup, and troubleshooting. Searches Radzen documentation and examples to return relevant guides and API references.

query.description: The search query — describe what you're looking for.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.
